title: 从 v0.2.8 到 v2.1.88：两次泄露的技术演进

urls_fetched.key_info: Christmas 2024 discovery, LLM cleanroom transpilation method, published Mar 1 2025
12 versions v2.1.74-v2.1.88, manual parsing methodology, ccdiag Go tool, 16.3% failure rate, orphaned tool calls, attestation bugs

v0.2.8.discoverer: Dave Schumaker (发现) + ghuntley (cleanroom 反混淆)
v0.2.8.scale: 单文件 cli.mjs, 早期简单 CLI

v2.1.88.scale: 1902 files, 512K+ lines TypeScript, 4756 files with deps

12_version_study.tools_built: ccdiag Go CLI (1571 sessions, 148444 tool calls)
